prompt: Soft golden bokeh circles filling the background — out-of-focus warm string lights or city lights at dusk. In the foreground, a few sharp autumn maple leaves in orange and gold on a wooden surface, slightly wet. Warm amber tones with a hint of cool lavender in the sky area. Gentle, romantic, nostalgic warmth. Shallow depth of field, everything soft except the leaves. 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
